description: A collection of studies evaluating the effects of compounds on specific cell types for target diseases.

study_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the study.

study_name.description: Name of the study, typically composed of cell type and study phase (e.g., 'hepatocyte (pilot)').

study_description.description: Human-readable description of the study, including the compound, cell type, and target disease.

entity_connection_table.description: Name of the database table storing entity connections for this study, following the pattern '{cell_type}_{study_phase}_entity_connection'.

study_ELN.description: Ordered list of Electronic Lab Notebook (ELN) references associated with this study, each entry specifying an ELN code and the corresponding data generation method. Format: '(N) ELNXXXXXX - {Method} Data Generation'.
